•   Use “resilience.jmp”.  
•   In this simple regression model, X is used to predict Y, and the p value (p value) < .0001.  
•   The scatterplot reveals a different perspective. If my score on X is 5, the regression model predicts my score on Y to be approximately 5. However, the actual score could range from 2 to 7, meaning it could be any value within that range. This indicates that the predictive model is practically ineffective.
